title: Determinants of public support for transport taxes
authors: Steffen Kallbekken, Jorge H. Garcia, Kristine Korneliussen

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: fuel taxes (taxes on gasoline and diesel)
tax_mentions.context: Referendum-style survey questions on support for maintaining, reducing, or increasing fuel taxes.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Transport pricing charge, not a fuel or carbon tax.
Parking charge, not a fuel or carbon tax.

inclusion_reason: Directly analyzes public support for fuel taxes on gasoline and diesel, using referendum-style survey questions and determinants of acceptance.
